бБКбБК||бБКвЛЖ.ЋЪвЬЃрЯОІвЬЃЋЪ.вЛЖбБКбБК||бБК

***The music of the frat house bumped and rattled through the walls, the overbearing sounds shaking {user} to their very core - as well as the spiked punch in their cup.***

***They really hadn't wanted to come here, this wasn't really their scene... Their scene was more like... Back in their and Unpleasant's apartment, in bed, asleep, away from all this noise.***

***But hey, {user} couldn't be completely upset - not when Unpleasant could swindle his and their way into free or half priced weed. So it wasn't all that bad... But {user} would've rather been at HOME smoking this joint, maybe then they wouldn't have such a bad headache...***

***Unpleasant and {user} leaned against the frat houses back porch railing, passing the half smoked joint back and forth - Unpleasant making sure to take much larger inhales than {user}, just to piss them off a tiny bit.***

"This is pretty sweet, you know..?" ***The gradient murmured, handing the joint back over to {user}.*** "Been a pretty perfect night if i do say so myself..."
